n. The native will
have a brother who will enjoy life with
Sun
Mars the native. The brother's wife will be a
Sat. Mer.
Ven. devotional woman and the brother will
Dt.
be employed in a medical concern.
Upto 38 years of age the native will be leading a·normal life and will attain
eminence in his 41st year. By about 50-51 he will further rise and occupy a
very good position. He will have 2 sons and 3 daughters. At 48-49, he will
enjoy life fully and have a substantial income. Between the age of 50-68 he
will be in a happy position in life with very sound financial position.
CHART 129
As Saturn contacts Rahu at first
in his rounds, the native will have
Dh.
considerable difficulties in his profes
sion up to 26-27 years of age. Between
Jupt.
28-30 he will get a decent job and rise
Moon
to the top rank. It will be a Govern
ment job. At 34-35 he will come into
possession of a house of his own, have
Sun
financial gains and have Raja Yoga Mars
Sat. Mer.
Between 46-52 he will take up a new Ven.
